name: Axe Chop
description: a heavy wooden thock of an axe biting into a tree
usage: Chopping oak_tree / pine_tree with the axe.

ai.prompt: An axe biting deep into wood: a heavy, meaty wooden thock with splintering, solid and impactful. High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready.

variation.note: repeating sound — game MUST round-robin + jitter every play
